html:
Wax Paper is prototyped at the Alchemy Engine. Beeswax is a renewable item as honeycombs are renewable from the Gigantic Beehive, making Wax Paper renewable as well. Additionally, after defeating Klaus, the player should receive the Stag Antler to open the Loot Stash and retrieve 4 wrapped bundles, which each return 1 Wax Paper when unwrapped.

Usage

Trivia

  • Wax Paper was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Herd Mentality update during A New Reign. It was later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
  • Wax Paper in DST was moved to the Alchemy Engine in the March 2022 QoL update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"For wrapping things."

15 sec.

40

Filters

Miscellaneous
"waxpaper"
“Some sheets of wax paper.”
–Wilson
“Heh, we rubbed a bunch of paper in beeswax.”
–Willow
“Strange paper not for make scribblemarks.”
–Wolfgang
“It feels so... nostalgic.”
–Wendy
“ENVIABLY WATERPROOF”
–WX-78
“Now we just require rope to secure it in place.”
–Wickerbottom
“A good place to spit out your gum.”
–Woodie
“My interest in this wax paper wanes....”
–Maxwell
“The melding of paper and wax for the purpose of preservation.”
–Wagstaff
“Waxen tö the töuch.”
–Wigfrid
“Why have paper you can't draw on?”
–Webber
“Can't write on it but I can wrap stuff with it.”
–Walani
“Wax paper! Always useful in the kitchen.”
–Warly
“Keeps tha weather outta me food.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS PAPER O' THE WAX”
–Wilba
“Shiny paper. So shiny”
–Wormwood
“If only it kept me as dry and warm as my things.”
–Wheeler
“So waxy.”
–Winona
“Waxy little wrapping scroll.”
–Wortox
“No pictures on this paper!”
–Wurt
“Mom used to use something like this for baking.”
–Walter
“With this, I can make time slow down for my food too!”
–Wanda
Wax Paper is prototyped at the Alchemy Engine. Beeswax is a renewable item as honeycombs are renewable from the Gigantic Beehive, making Wax Paper renewable as well. Additionally, after defeating Klaus, the player should receive the Stag Antler to open the Loot Stash and retrieve 4 wrapped bundles, which each return 1 Wax Paper when unwrapped.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Wax Paper was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Herd Mentality update during A New Reign. It was later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
Wax Paper in DST was moved to the Alchemy Engine in the March 2022 QoL update.

Wax Paper is prototyped at the [[Alchemy Engine]]. Beeswax is a renewable item as honeycombs are renewable from the [[Gigantic Beehive]], making Wax Paper renewable as well. Additionally, after defeating [[Klaus]], the player should receive the [[Stag Antler]] to open the [[Loot Stash]] and retrieve 4 wrapped bundles, which each return 1 Wax Paper when unwrapped.

== {{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Wax Paper
|count1 = 1
|item2 = Rope
|count2 = 1
|tool = Blueprint
|result = Bundling Wrap}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Wax Paper was introduced to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' in the ''[[A New Reign#November 24th, 2016 - Herd Mentality|Herd Mentality]]'' update during ''[[A New Reign]]''. It was later added to ''[[Don't Starve]]'' in the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History|Quality of Life]]'' update.
* Wax Paper in DST was moved to the Alchemy Engine in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#March 24, 2022 - March 2022 QoL Update|March 2022 QoL update]].
